member.name: T:Valaiorp.Memory.Contracts.IConversationMemory
member.summary: Cross-agent conversation memory keyed by ConversationId. Shared across all agents participating in the same conversation turn.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Memory.Contracts.IConversationMemory.GetRecentHistoryAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the last turns for context window management.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Memory.Implementations.JsonlConversationMemory
member.summary: File-backed conversation memory. Each conversation is appended to its own JSONL file so history survives process restarts.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Memory.Implementations.JsonlLongTermMemory
member.summary: File-backed long-term memory. Each context, log stream, and feedback stream is written to its own file under the configured directory so data survives process restarts.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Memory.Implementations.JsonlShortTermMemory
member.summary: File-backed short-term memory. All key-value pairs are persisted to a single JSON file so data survives process restarts. A SemaphoreSlim serialises concurrent access.
